commentText: I know about them, but how do you integrate, can you give advice?

tags.reasoning: Lucas is asking for advice, so I want to learn more about his situation before giving advice.

reply: The discipline to do what you planned no matter what is PRIMARY. Then you need to program your environment to help you, not sabotage you. If a person doesn't know what fucks up their motivation, mood and willpower or what gives him strength, it's the first thing he needs to do. Know thyself. After that comes aligned action. Another big one is to understand that you only need to win the internal battle in the moment. To go through the lowest point, deepest darkness... and finish the day on top. It's not about perfection, almost nobody knows how to integrate these habits while living a normal life. I failed soooo many times... Key is to keep coming back to the path and not give up. . . so this is the core of integration. . . what habits would you like to integrate Lucas?

commentText: Life Coach Rob • Feb 1It’s all about providing value!
